title: RapidMeta Respiratory | Ensifentrine for COPD (PDE3/4 Inhibitor) v1.0

pico.pop: Adults with moderate-to-severe COPD (post-bronchodilator FEV1 30-70% predicted), symptomatic (CAT >=10), on background bronchodilator(s)
pico.int: Ensifentrine 3 mg BID (nebulized PDE3/4 dual inhibitor)
pico.comp: Placebo on top of background therapy
pico.out: Annualized rate of moderate-or-severe COPD exacerbations over 24 weeks
pico.subgroup: Background therapy (LAMA mono vs LAMA+LABA vs triple), eosinophil count, smoking status

real_data_entries.name: ENHANCE-1
real_data_entries.group: Moderate-severe COPD on stable background therapy, ensifentrine 3 mg BID nebulized vs placebo (24 wk, exacerbation rate ratio)

allOutcomes.title: Annualized moderate/severe COPD exacerbation rate (primary; 24 wk, RR vs placebo)
Peak FEV1 change at week 12 (mL, MD vs placebo)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Anzueto AB et al. Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2024;209:824-834 (ENHANCE-1).

real_data_entries.name: ENHANCE-2
real_data_entries.group: Moderate-severe COPD on stable background therapy, ensifentrine 3 mg BID nebulized vs placebo (24 wk, replicate of ENHANCE-1)

allOutcomes.title: Annualized moderate/severe COPD exacerbation rate (primary; 24 wk, RR vs placebo)
Peak FEV1 change at week 12 (mL, MD vs placebo)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Anzueto AB et al. Am J Respir Crit Care Med 2024;209:824-834 (ENHANCE-2, replicate pivotal).

extra_replaces: Ensifentrine (nebulized PDE3/4 dual inhibitor, 3 mg BID)
